overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle driving through a futuristic urban highway. The scene features a distinctive yellow tower with graffiti on the left, a massive stadium structure on the right, and transitions past large animated digital billboards with flying vehicles visible in the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with cyberpunk architecture

events.description: road curves slightly to the right as vehicle passes alongside the yellow tower

agents.ego_description: driving forward in the right lane of a multi-lane highway, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: blue car driving in the left lane, moving same direction

entered.detail: tall yellow building with NO FUTURE graffiti and geometric patterns dominating the left side
massive circular stadium with dark facade and exposed structural elements
metal guardrail with black and yellow chevron patterns
tall street light with horizontal orange bar

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a multi-lane highway with a distinctive yellow cyberpunk tower on the left and a massive stadium structure on the right. The road curves slightly right as other vehicles share the highway, with clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with power lines

events.description: white van overtakes in the left lane and passes by

agents.ego_description: continuing straight on the highway as the yellow tower recedes behind

notable_agents.action: white van overtaking in the left lane, moving faster than ego vehicle

entered.detail: series of tall pylons with multiple cables running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: Having passed the yellow tower, the vehicle continues along the elevated highway with the stadium still visible on the right. Overhead power lines run parallel to the road, and a white van overtakes on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with large digital advertising displays

events.description: large animated digital billboard with character faces comes into view on the right
flying vehicles appear in the sky overhead, moving across the frame

agents.ego_description: driving past the large digital billboard while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: red car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying animated characters and advertisements
futuristic flying cars hovering in the sky above the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes a massive digital billboard on the right displaying animated cyberpunk characters. Flying vehicles appear in the sky overhead, adding to the futuristic atmosphere while the stadium structure remains visible on the right.

events.description: approaching large overhead highway gantry with signage and structural beams

agents.ego_description: driving toward the overhead gantry structure while passing the digital billboard

entered.detail: large metal highway gantry with multiple signs and structural beams spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a large overhead highway gantry structure while the digital billboard recedes behind. Flying vehicles continue to move across the sky, and the stadium structure remains a constant presence on the right side of the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a futuristic highway that transitions from a vista of towering architecture to a dense corridor of digital advertisements and aerial traffic. It begins by curving right past a distinctive yellow cyberpunk tower on the left and a massive stadium structure on the right under a clear blue sky. As the vehicle moves forward, the tower recedes and the camera tracks alongside overhead power lines while a white van overtakes on the left. The scene then expands to reveal a massive digital billboard displaying animated characters on the right, as flying vehicles begin to populate the sky above. Finally, the camera approaches a large overhead highway gantry while the billboard fades into the distance, all while the stadium remains a constant presence on the right.
